patches.hypothesis: The bug is caused by the stop method setting the stopTime regardless of whether the stopwatch was suspended or running. This results in the total time being equal to the suspend time, causing the test to fail. The fix is to update the stopTime only if the stopwatch was running.

The bug is caused by the stop method resetting the stopTime when the stopwatch is stopped after being suspended. The fix should ensure that the stopTime remains the same as the suspendTime when stopping after suspension.
